title: izba dogfood trajectory bundle (Phase 2 output / Phase 3 input)
description: Per-shard trajectory bundle: for each journey this shard ran, the ordered actions (with outputs, timings, and the reconciler snapshot after each) plus the deterministic+model oracle candidates. Produced by run_journeys.py; consumed by the local Phase 3 skeptic/synthesis.

shard.description: Shard index this bundle was produced by (0-based).

feature.description: Feature name copied from the journeys file.

state_evidence.description: The product's OWN authoritative end-state after the journey — the state-based oracle the Phase-3 trajectory-skeptic grades outcomes against (NOT guest exit codes). Per sandbox the journey created: `izba policy show` (allow-list + enforce posture) and `izba netlog --summary` (what the firewall actually allowed/denied), plus the final reconcile snapshot.

per_sandbox.description: Keyed by sandbox name; each has policy_show + netlog capture results (argv/exit_code/stdout/stderr). per_sandbox entries also carry console_tail (last 8 KiB of the guest serial console).

invoke_log.description: GUI only: the in-page bridge's invoke log (command, ok/error, duration) captured at journey end — the evidence behind silent_failure verdicts.

intent.description: The step intent this action was taken for.

command.description: The concrete shell command the Actor chose (e.g. 'izba ls').

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the action in milliseconds.

reconcile.description: The izba __reconcile --json snapshot taken right after the action.

error.description: Present iff the __reconcile snapshot itself failed (spawn/timeout/parse) — the snapshot carries no state and the seq oracle skipped it.

snapshot.description: GUI only: the rendered accessibility set-of-marks the Actor saw after this action (role + name + @ref lines), trimmed. Empty for CLI actions.

console_errors.description: GUI only: uncaught JS errors / unhandled rejections collected by the in-page bridge during this action.

screenshot_ref.description: GUI only: artifact-relative path of an annotated screenshot captured on failure (for the Phase-3 skeptic). Absent on success.

kind.description: Which oracle produced the candidate. CLI oracles: functional/latency/implicit/reconcile_seq/infra/unreached_decisive/reconcile_violation/guest_console. GUI oracles: console (uncaught JS error / rejection), ui_daemon_diff (UI state disagrees with daemon truth), silent_failure (invoke rejected with no visible error surface), dom_expect (user-observable expectation absent from the snapshot). infra = harness/model transport failure (journey verified nothing). unreached_decisive = a decisive step produced no actions (#126). reconcile_violation = `izba __reconcile` reported violations. guest_console = crash marker in a guest's console.log.

decisive.description: Functional oracle only: true iff this candidate came from a journey's decisive (core, or fallback last) step. The collector flips a journey negative on a decisive functional candidate; a non-decisive one is soft (surfaced but does not bury the journey). Absent on non-functional candidates.

graded_cmd.description: Functional oracle only: the exact command whose exit code was graded (the expect_cmd_re-selected action, or the step's final action).

source.description: Where that expectation is traced from (spec/pr/help/contract).

trajectory_ref.description: Pointer back into this bundle that reproduces the candidate.

action_index.description: Index into the journey's actions array (-1 if not tied to a single action).
